product: AI/BI dashboard active filter bar and visualization improvements
tagline: Active filter bar: A new filter bar shows all active filters on a dashboard.
what_it_does: Active filter bar: A new filter bar shows all active filters on a dashboard. Any filter (global or page level) not set to All, as well as any cross filtering, appears in this bar. Minimum and maximum aggregations for date fields: Date fields now support minimum and maximum aggregations.
why_it_matters: Improved histogram labels: Histograms now display both the start and end of each bin, instead of only the start.
key_takeaway: Active filter bar: A new filter bar shows all active filters on a dashboard.
